title: Resume a summary rewrite after another weak draft
goal: Finish the evidence-grounded summary without smoothing over the source differences.
interruption_point: The run stopped after a second weak draft and a narrowed plan.

events.text: Goal: Finish the evidence-grounded summary without smoothing over the source differences.
Plan: Re-read the disagreement notes, keep each claim attached to its source, and rewrite the summary around the contested points.
Constraint: Do not collapse the differences into one blended claim.
Source: docs/memory_strategy_b.md says raw history should stay searchable for re-checking.
Attempt: Rewrote the summary from the old draft. The summary stayed weak because the disputed claims still lacked source anchors.
Lesson: The weak rewrite came from reusing the old draft instead of rebuilding from the evidence rows.
Decision: Rebuild the summary from the evidence rows and list the contested claims explicitly.
Next step: Reopen the evidence matrix and rewrite the contested section claim by claim.
